news.headline: Bilawal pledges to address Diamer-Bhasha Dam resettlement issues if PPP wins GB polls
news.summary:

news.headline: Israel’s High Court Rejects Ban on Red Cross Visits for Palestinian Prisoners
news.summary: Israel forbade the visits, which allow the Red Cross to monitor prisoners’ conditions, in 2023. Justices said the policy violated Israeli and international law.

news.summary:
